ques: Identify the most downloaded models on Hugging face that use the PaddlePaddle library.
answer: The most downloaded Hugging Face model using the PaddlePaddle library is **PaddlePaddle/PP-Chart2Table** (Image-to-Text, ~6.14k downloads). The next most downloaded are logasanjeev/indian-id-validator (~1.73k) and PaddlePaddle/PP-DocBee2-3B (~175).
